LIST.DESCRIPTION: Configure global nameplate settings for type:
LIST.TITLE: Global Nameplate Settings

INVERTISOMETRY.HINT: If enabled, will undo the perspective changes of isometric projection modules for nameplates
INVERTISOMETRY.LABEL: Invert Isometry Transform

PLACEABOVEPLACEABLES.HINT: When enabled, nameplates will always be displayed above tokens, tiles, and other placeables
PLACEABOVEPLACEABLES.LABEL: Place Nameplates Above Tokens
